{{ $css := resources.Get "css/main.css" | resources.Minify | resources.Fingerprint }} {{ $alertsCss := resources.Get "css/alerts.css" | resources.Minify | resources.Fingerprint }} {{ $tablesCss := resources.Get "css/tables.css" | resources.Minify | resources.Fingerprint }} {{ $js := resources.Get "js/main.js" | resources.Minify | resources.Fingerprint }} {{ $alertsJs := resources.Get "js/alerts.js" | resources.Minify | resources.Fingerprint }} {{ $search := resources.Get "js/search.js" | resources.Minify | resources.Fingerprint }} {{/* Hugo's `default` treats `false` as empty → coerces it back to true, so `enabled = false` in hugo.toml was silently ignored. Use isset to distinguish "not set" (default on) from "explicitly set to false". */}} {{ $chatEnabled := true }}{{ if isset .Site.Params.chat "enabled" }}{{ $chatEnabled = .Site.Params.chat.enabled }}{{ end }} {{ if $chatEnabled }} {{ $chatCss := resources.Get "css/chat.css" | resources.Minify | resources.Fingerprint }} {{ end }}
{{ partial "navbar.html" . }}
{{ partial "sidebar.html" . }}
{{ if not .IsHome }}{{ partial "breadcrumb.html" . }}{{ end }} {{ block "main" . }}{{ end }}
{{ partial "toc.html" . }}
{{ partial "footer.html" . }}
{{ if $chatEnabled }} {{/* quick.js loads async so a slow Quick response doesn't block the footer or the chat mount. chat.js waits for `quick` to appear rather than reading it synchronously at DOMContentLoaded. */}} {{ partial "chat.html" . }} {{ $chatJs := resources.Get "js/chat.js" | resources.Minify | resources.Fingerprint }} {{ end }} {{ if .Store.Get "hasMermaid" }} {{ end }}
